title: rosa micrantha f. histrix
intro: Rosa micrantha f. histrix, also known as the Rosa micrantha 'Histrix', is a fragrant, climbing rose species native to China. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to exhibit antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory activities, which contribute to its health benefits. The Rosa micrantha f. histrix plant is traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, digestive problems, and respiratory conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
intro_study: According to "Frontiers in pharmacology", rosa micrantha f. histrix benefits include its high vitamin C content, which makes it a suitable candidate for skincare formulations to treat various skin disorders, such as scarring, anti-aging, hyperpigmentation, and atopic dermatitis.
